title: citrus × aurantium subf. sulcata
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. sulcata, also known as bitter orange or sour orange, is a hybrid plant of the citrus family, specifically a cross between the pomelo and the orange. The medicinal properties of Citrus × aurantium subf. sulcata include its ability to act as a stimulant, improve digestion, and enhance circulation due to its high concentration of volatile oils. This plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fatigue, indigestion, and anxiety, as well as to support weight loss and improve mental clarity. Herbal preparations of Citrus × aurantium subf. sulcata include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used in aromatherapy, as dietary supplements, or as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
